title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure poses a significant threat to organizations relying on cloud-based services. By exploiting compromised CI/CD pipelines, attackers can deploy malicious code, potentially leading to data encryption, service disruption, and financial losses.
recommended_actions: Conduct an immediate review and hardening of CI/CD pipelines, including access controls and credential management.
Implement robust backup strategies for cloud-based data and ensure backups are stored in isolated environments.
Deploy advanced threat detection tools to monitor for unusual activity in cloud environments and CI/CD workflows.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat, but its widespread use could lead to potential risks if the tool contains flaws, is misused, or is exploited by malicious actors to identify vulnerabilities in target systems.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool's source code and security practices before integrating it into your workflow.
Monitor for updates or patches to the tool itself to ensure its security over time.
Educate your team on proper usage to avoid exposing sensitive systems or data during scans.

title: Micronaut Framework vulnerable to a Denial of Service in HTML error response caching
description:
`DefaultHtmlErrorResponseBodyProvider` in `io.micronaut:micronaut-http-server` since `4.7.0` and until `4.10.7` used an unbounded `ConcurrentHashMap` cache with no eviction policy. If the application throws an exception whose message may be influenced by an attacker, for example, including request query value parameters,  this could be used by remote attackers
to cause a denial of service (unbounded heap growth and OutOfMemoryError). 

Fixed via: https://github.com/micronaut-projects/micronaut-c

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33012.

title: Nest Fastify HEAD Request Middleware Bypass
description:
### Impact

In a NestJS application using `@nestjs/platform-fastify`, GET middleware can be bypassed because Fastify automatically redirects HEAD requests to the corresponding GET handlers (if they exist).

As a result:

- Middleware will be completely skipped.
- The HTTP response won't include a body (since the response is truncated when redirecting a HEAD request to a GET handler).
- The actual handler will still be executed.

### Patches

Fixed in `@nestjs/platform-fastify@11.1.16`

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-33011.

title: Egress Policy Bypass via DNS over HTTPS (DoH) in Harden-Runner (Community Tier)
description:
## Summary

A vulnerability exists in the Community Tier of Harden-Runner that allows bypassing the `egress-policy: block` network restriction using DNS over HTTPS (DoH).

Harden-Runner secures GitHub Actions workflows on runners by applying network policies, including an `allowed-endpoints` configuration that limits outbound traffic to specified domains and ports (e.g., `github.com:443`). In `egress-policy: block` mode, non-compliant connections are intercepted and denied. 

This vulnerability

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32947.

title: Egress Policy Bypass via DNS over TCP in Harden-Runner (Community Tier)
description:
## Summary

A vulnerability exists in the Community Tier of Harden-Runner that allows bypassing the `egress-policy: block` network restriction using DNS queries over TCP.

Harden-Runner enforces egress policies on GitHub runners by filtering outbound connections at the network layer. When `egress-policy: block` is enabled with a restrictive allowed-endpoints list (e.g., only `github.com:443`), all non-compliant traffic should be denied. However, DNS queries over TCP, commonly used for large resp

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to bypass egress network restrictions in the Community Tier of Harden-Runner by leveraging DNS queries over TCP. This could enable unauthorized data exfiltration or communication with malicious endpoints, undermining the security model of restricted environments.
recommended_actions: Implement additional monitoring and logging for DNS traffic, especially DNS queries over TCP, to detect and investigate suspicious activity.
Apply updates or patches provided by the Harden-Runner maintainers as soon as they become available to address the vulnerability.
Restrict DNS traffic at the network level by enforcing strict egress rules and considering the use of application-layer firewalls to block unauthorized DNS over TCP traffic.

title: Parse Server LiveQuery subscription with invalid regular expression crashes server
description:
### Impact

A remote attacker can crash the Parse Server by subscribing to a LiveQuery with an invalid regular expression pattern. The server process terminates when the invalid pattern reaches the regex engine during subscription matching, causing denial of service for all connected clients.

### Patches

The fix validates regular expression patterns at subscription time, rejecting invalid patterns before they are stored. Additionally, a defense-in-depth try-catch prevents any subscription matc

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32770.

title: Parse Server session creation endpoint allows overwriting server-generated session fields
description:
### Impact

An authenticated user can overwrite server-generated session fields (`sessionToken`, `expiresAt`, `createdWith`) when creating a session object via `POST /classes/_Session`. This allows bypassing the server's session expiration policy by setting an arbitrary far-future expiration date. It also allows setting a predictable session token value.

### Patches

The session creation endpoint now filters out server-generated fields from user-supplied data, preventing them from being overwri

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32742.

title: Parse Server vulnerable to schema poisoning via prototype pollution in deep copy
description:
### Impact

An attacker can bypass the default request keyword denylist protection and the class-level permission for adding fields by sending a crafted request that exploits prototype pollution in the deep copy mechanism. This allows injecting fields into class schemas that have field addition locked down, and can cause permanent schema type conflicts that cannot be resolved even with the master key.

### Patches

The vulnerable third-party deep copy library has been replaced with a built-in de

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32878.

title: The Angeet ES3 KVM does not properly sanitize user-supplied variables parsed by the 'cfg.lua'...
description: The Angeet ES3 KVM does not properly sanitize user-supplied variables parsed by the 'cfg.lua' script, allowing an authenticated attacker to execute OS-level commands.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Angeet ES3 KVM's 'cfg.lua' script allows authenticated attackers to execute OS-level commands, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data breaches, or system compromise.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-32298.
Restrict access to the KVM management interface to trusted IP ranges and implement multi-factor authentication (MFA) for all users.
Conduct a security audit to identify any unauthorized access or changes that may have occurred due to this vulnerability.

title: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Simple Food Order System 1.0. Affected by this...
description: A vulnerability was identified in code-projects Simple Food Order System 1.0. Affected by this vulnerability is an unknown functionality of the file /routers/add-item.php. Such manipulation of the argument price leads to sql injection. The attack can be launched remotely. The exploit is publicly available and might be used.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4319.

title: Sipeed NanoKVM before 2.3.1 exposes a Wi-Fi configuration endpoint without proper security checks...
description: Sipeed NanoKVM before 2.3.1 exposes a Wi-Fi configuration endpoint without proper security checks, allowing an unauthenticated attacker with network access to change the saved configured Wi-Fi network to one of the attacker's choosing, or craft a request to exhaust the system memory and terminate the KVM process.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to manipulate Wi-Fi configurations or exhaust system memory, potentially leading to denial of service and unauthorized network access.
recommended_actions: Update Sipeed NanoKVM to version 2.3.1 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Restrict network access to the device by implementing firewall rules and network segmentation.
Monitor device logs for unusual activity and implement intrusion detection systems.

title: The Angeet ES3 KVM allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to write arbitrary files, including...
description: The Angeet ES3 KVM allows a remote, unauthenticated attacker to write arbitrary files, including configuration files or system binaries. Modified configuration files or system binaries could allow an attacker to take complete control of a vulnerable system.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32297.

title: JetKVM before 0.5.4 does not rate limit login requests, enabling brute-force attempts to guess...
description: JetKVM before 0.5.4 does not rate limit login requests, enabling brute-force attempts to guess credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32295.

title: A use-after-free vulnerability can be triggered in sharded clusters by an authenticated user with...
description: A use-after-free vulnerability can be triggered in sharded clusters by an authenticated user with the read role who issues a specially crafted $lookup or $graphLookup aggregation pipeline.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an authenticated user with minimal privileges (read role) to exploit a use-after-free condition in sharded clusters, potentially leading to remote code execution, denial of service, or data corruption.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update from the vendor addressing CVE-2026-4148.
Restrict access to the database by limiting user roles and permissions to the minimum necessary.
Monitor logs for unusual or suspicious $lookup or $graphLookup aggregation queries and implement additional query validation if possible.

title: This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution)  vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.6.0,...
description:
This High severity RCE (Remote Code Execution)  vulnerability was introduced in versions 9.6.0, 10.0.0, 10.1.0, 10.2.0, 11.0.0, 11.1.0, 12.0.0, and 12.1.0 of Bamboo Data Center.

This RCE (Remote Code Execution) vulnerability, with a CVSS Score of 8.6, allows an authenticated attacker to execute malicious code on the remote system.

Atlassian recommends that Bamboo Data Center customers upgrade to latest version, if you are unable to do so, upgrade your instance to one of the specified supported

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-21570.

title: An authenticated user with the read role may read limited amounts of uninitialized stack memory...
description: An authenticated user with the read role may read limited amounts of uninitialized stack memory via specially-crafted issuances of the filemd5 command.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: This vulnerability allows an authenticated user with minimal privileges to read uninitialized stack memory, potentially exposing sensitive information such as passwords, tokens, or other confidential data. The risk is heightened by the ability to exploit this issue via the filemd5 command.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patch or update provided by the vendor to address CVE-2026-4147.
Restrict access to the filemd5 command to only trusted and necessary users by adjusting role-based permissions.
Monitor system logs for unusual or suspicious activity related to the filemd5 command and investigate any anomalies.

title: JetKVM prior to 0.5.4 does not verify the authenticity of downloaded firmware files. An attacker...
description: JetKVM prior to 0.5.4 does not verify the authenticity of downloaded firmware files. An attacker-in-the-middle or a compromised update server could modify the firmware and the corresponding SHA256 hash to pass verification.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32294.

title: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM web interface does not limit login requests, enabling brute-force...
description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM web interface does not limit login requests, enabling brute-force attempts to guess credentials.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with critical severity. CVE: CVE-2026-32292.

title: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM does not require authentication on the UART serial console. This...
description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM does not require authentication on the UART serial console. This attack requires physically opening the device and connecting to the UART pins.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The lack of authentication on the UART serial console in the GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM creates a vulnerability that could allow an attacker with physical access to the device to bypass security controls and potentially execute arbitrary commands or extract sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Implement physical security measures to restrict unauthorized access to the device, such as locking the device in a secure enclosure.
Apply firmware updates or patches from the vendor if available to address the authentication issue on the UART interface.
Disable or restrict UART access if it is not required for normal device operation.

title: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM connects to a GL-iNet site during boot-up to provision client and...
description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM connects to a GL-iNet site during boot-up to provision client and CA certificates. The GL-RM1 does not verify certificates used for this connection, allowing an attacker-in-the-middle to serve invalid client and CA certificates. The GL-RM1 will attempt to use the invalid certificates and fail to connect to the legitimate GL-iNet KVM cloud service.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform a man-in-the-middle (MITM) attack during the boot-up process, potentially compromising the integrity of client and CA certificates. This could lead to unauthorized access, data interception, or denial of service for legitimate users attempting to connect to the GL-iNet KVM cloud service.
recommended_actions: Implement certificate validation on the GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) to ensure only trusted certificates are accepted during the boot-up process.
Deploy network monitoring tools to detect and mitigate potential MITM attacks targeting the provisioning process.
Advise users to isolate affected devices from critical networks until a firmware update or patch is applied.

title: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM does not sufficiently verify the authenticity of uploaded firmware...
description: The GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM does not sufficiently verify the authenticity of uploaded firmware files. An attacker-in-the-middle or a compromised update server could modify the firmware and the corresponding MD5 hash to pass verification.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the GL-iNet Comet (GL-RM1) KVM firmware verification process allows attackers to upload malicious firmware, potentially leading to device compromise, unauthorized access, data exfiltration, or further attacks on connected systems.
recommended_actions: Implement a secure firmware verification mechanism using cryptographic signatures (e.g., SHA-256 or RSA) instead of MD5.
Release and apply a firmware update to patch the vulnerability and notify users of the security risk.
Advise users to only download firmware updates from trusted sources and verify the integrity of the files before installation.

title: CVE-2026-28693 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, an integer overflow in DIB coder can result in out of bounds read or write. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28693.

title: CVE-2026-28692 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, MAT decoder uses 32-bit arithmetic due to incorrect parenthesization resulting in a heap over-read. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28692.

title: CVE-2026-28691 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, an uninitialized pointer dereference vulnerability exists in the JBIG decoder due to a missing check. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28691.

title: CVE-2026-28690 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, a stack buffer overflow vulnerability exists in the MNG encoder. There is a bounds checks missing that could corrupting the stack with attacker-controlled data. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28690.

title: CVE-2026-28689 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, domain="path" authorization is checked before final file open/use. A symlink swap between check-time and use-time bypasses policy-denied read/write. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28689.

title: CVE-2026-28688 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, a heap-use-after-free vulnerability exists in the MSL encoder, where a cloned image is destroyed twice. The MSL coder does not support writing MSL so the write capability has been removed. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28688.

title: CVE-2026-28687 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, a heap use-after-free vulnerability in ImageMagick's MSL decoder allows an attacker to trigger access to freed memory by crafting an MSL file. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28687.

title: CVE-2026-28686 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, A heap-buffer-overflow vulnerability exists in the PCL encode due to an undersized output buffer allocation. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28686.

title: CVE-2026-28494 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41, a stack buffer overflow exists in ImageMagick's morphology kernel parsing functions. User-controlled kernel strings exceeding a buffer are copied into fixed-size stack buffers via memcpy without bounds checking, resulting in stack corruption. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16 and 6.9.13-41.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28494.

title: CVE-2026-28493 - ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior
description: ImageMagick is free and open-source software used for editing and manipulating digital images. Prior to versions 7.1.2-16, an integer overflow vulnerability exists in the SIXEL decoer. The vulnerability allows an attacker to perform an out of bounds via a specially crafted image. This vulnerability is fixed in 7.1.2-16.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28493.

title: CVE-2026-28433 - Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers running versions 10.
description: Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers running versions 10.93.0 and later, but prior to 2026.3.1, contain a vulnerability that allows importing other users' data due to lack of ownership validation. The impact of this vulnerability is estimated to be relatively low, as bad actors would require the ID corresponding to the target file for import. This vulnerability is fixed in 2026.3.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28433.

title: CVE-2026-28432 - Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers prior to 2026.3.1 co
description: Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers prior to 2026.3.1 contain a vulnerability that allows bypassing HTTP signature verification. Although this is a vulnerability related to federation, it affects all servers regardless of whether federation is enabled or disabled. This vulnerability is fixed in 2026.3.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28432.

title: CVE-2026-28431 - Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers running versions 8.4
description: Misskey is an open source, federated social media platform. All Misskey servers running versions 8.45.0 and later, but prior to 2026.3.1, contain a vulnerability that allows bad actors access to data that they ordinarily wouldn't be able to access due to insufficient permission checks and proper input validation. This vulnerability occurs regardless of whether federation is enabled or not. This vulnerability could lead to a significant data breach. This vulnerability is fixed in 2026.3.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-28431.

title: CVE-2026-26982 - Ghostty is a cross-platform terminal emulator. Ghostty allows control characters such as 0x03 (Ctrl+
description: Ghostty is a cross-platform terminal emulator. Ghostty allows control characters such as 0x03 (Ctrl+C) in pasted and dropped text. These can be used to execute arbitrary commands in some shell environments. This attack requires an attacker to convince the user to copy and paste or drag and drop malicious text. The attack requires user interaction to be triggered, but the dangerous characters are invisible in most GUI environments so it isn't trivially detected, especially if the string contents are complex. Fixed in Ghostty v1.3.0.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-26982.

title: CVE-2026-1776 - Camaleon CMS versions 2.4.5.0 through 2.9.0, prior to commit f54a77e, contain a path traversal vulne
description: Camaleon CMS versions 2.4.5.0 through 2.9.0, prior to commit f54a77e, contain a path traversal vulnerability in the AWS S3 uploader implementation that allows authenticated users to read arbitrary files from the web server’s filesystem. The issue occurs in the download_private_file functionality when the application is configured to use the CamaleonCmsAwsUploader backend. Unlike the local uploader implementation, the AWS uploader does not validate file paths with valid_folder_path?, allowing directory traversal sequences to be supplied via the file parameter. As a result, any authenticated user, including low-privileged registered users, can access sensitive files such as /etc/passwd. This issue represents a bypass of the incomplete fix for CVE-2024-46987 and affects deployments using the AWS S3 storage backend.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1776.
